findings.description: Unit 0002 (images must be housed in the Accent shape — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles) is not represented by any candidate rule in this group. This is a distinct hard scope/shape constraint referencing §2.5 and is missing entirely from the cluster.

payload.statement: Images must be housed in the Accent shape (asymmetric rounded-corner crops); plain rectangles or circles are prohibited.

findings.description: Alt text rule is flagged as a 'brand accessibility rule' but lacks governance facets (e.g., compliance standard reference such as WCAG, enforcement owner, or review cadence) expected for accessibility/compliance-class rules.

Hardness set to strong_default but source text uses definitive descriptive language ('warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery' as the defining style, not merely a fallback default) with no alternative offered elsewhere in the unit, suggesting this may warrant hard_constraint rather than strong_default; verify against broader imagery guidelines.

This rule is thematically tied to the Accent shape/photography housing rules (all under 'Image Treatment' heading) but is clustered independently while a related shape rule (u_0002) is omitted — suggests the group's image-treatment rules should be reviewed together for completeness rather than partial extraction.
